notes:
Completed the game. Small issues: Some lagging in the last few missions if there were to many enemies on the screen at once. Since you are supposed to kill them anyway, it lagged only shortly. Crashed after completing the very last mission, but worked fine on retry.

Unsure whether these are due to Proton or due to it being an old game on a custom engine. Didn’t impede gameplay either way.
title: Giants: Citizen Kabuto
